summary: Phase 3 QA Features - AI Diagnostic Token System and Product Tour tested. All backend token API tests pass (8/8). Product Tour fully functional with 6 steps, navigation, keyboard controls, mobile responsive. Token status API returns correct format with free_trial plan limit of 10 tokens. EFI Side Panel with token badge is role-restricted to technician/admin only (owner role excluded).

issues: Token status badge only visible to technician/admin roles - owner role cannot see it in JobCard view

action_items: Consider adding 'owner' role to isTechnician || isAdmin check in JobCard.jsx line 868 to allow owners to see EFI panel with token status
critical_code_review_comments: EFI Side Panel role restriction (technician/admin only) may prevent owners from accessing AI diagnostic features and seeing token status. Line 868 in JobCard.jsx: `{(isTechnician || isAdmin) && efiPanelOpen && ...}`

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Product Tour 100%, EFI token badge limited by role restriction)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Token System fully functional - backend API at /api/v1/ai-usage/status works correctly returning tokens_used, tokens_limit, tokens_remaining, plan, resets_on. Product Tour has 6 steps (Dashboard, AI Diagnosis, GST Invoicing, Payments, Inventory, Complete Workshop OS). EFI Side Panel with token status is in JobCard.jsx but restricted to technician/admin roles. Token limits: free_trial=10, starter=25, professional=100, enterprise=999999.

backend_api.ai_usage_status_format: PASSED - Returns tokens_used, tokens_limit, tokens_remaining, plan, resets_on
backend_api.demo_user_token_limit: PASSED - free_trial plan has 10 token limit
backend_api.resets_on_date: PASSED - Shows first day of next month (2026-04-01)
backend_api.idempotent_status_calls: PASSED - Multiple calls don't change token count

product_tour.tour_opens_from_hero_button: PASSED - 'See It In Action' button opens tour
product_tour.tour_opens_from_strip: PASSED - Tour strip between hero and problem section works
product_tour.tour_has_6_steps: PASSED - Steps 1-6 with proper navigation dots
product_tour.step1_dashboard_content: PASSED - Shows revenue ₹4,82,350, Open Tickets 13, etc.
product_tour.step6_modules_grid: PASSED - Shows 16 modules (Tickets, Invoices, Inventory, etc.)
product_tour.step6_cta_button: PASSED - 'Start Your Free Trial' CTA on step 6
product_tour.prev_button_navigation: PASSED - Goes back to previous step
product_tour.mobile_responsive: PASSED - Tour card 358px width on 390px viewport

efi_panel_token_status.token_status_in_api: PASSED - API returns correct token info
efi_panel_token_status.token_badge_in_efi_panel: LIMITED - Only visible to technician/admin roles, demo user (owner) cannot see it
